Name: actors_get_interesting_jobs
Description: Retrieves interesting jobs for a specified actor or actress using the RapidAPI service. Parameters: {"nconst": {"description": "The unique identifier for the actor/actress, which should start with \"nm\" (e.g., \"nm0001667\").
Also, I want to track my nutrient intake for the past week starting from October 29, 2025. I have the meals I consumed with their nutrients detailed.
